response.original_title: Above All - Inside The Littlewoods Dream Factory
response.overview: Littlewoods was once the largest family-owned business in the UK, employing over 30,000 women at its peak. Using archive images, interviews and conversations, Liverpool poet Jeff Young, animator Laura Spark and musician Jezebel Halewood-Leagas lead us through the derelict Littlewoods HQ conjuring fond memories to life once more.
response.title: Above All - Inside The Littlewoods Dream Factory
